variant: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

request.message: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

response_body.response:
i'm building you a 12-week looksmaxx plan across skinmax, hairmax, and fitmax. you're 22, female, beginner lifter with a barbell, oily skin, 07:00 wake / 23:00 sleep. let's go.

**skinmax** (oily skin, no active concerns): gentle cleanse → azelaic acid am → retinoid pm (start low, titrate up). barrier repair via ceramides + niacinamide. spf daily. by week 4 you'll see clearer, smoother texture.

**hairmax**: scalp health first (gentle shampoo, massage protocol). then thickness via protein intake + iron + zinc. minimal heat, silk pillowcase. visible density shift week 6–8.

**fitmax**: beginner barbell program, 4 days/week (upper/lower split). progressive overload on compounds. pair with 1.6–2g protein per kg bodyweight daily. strength baseline week 1, noticeable muscle definition week 8–10.

here's your weekly breakdown:

products.name: Doctor's Best High Absorption Magnesium Glycinate Lysinate (240ct)
products.description: Glycinate form (best absorbed) — 200-400mg at night for recovery + sleep.

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Rice + Probiotic SPF 50+ PA++++
products.description: Cosmetic-elegant Asian SPF — chemical filters, no white cast.

products.name: Alpecin C1 Caffeine Shampoo
products.description: Caffeine shampoo — DHT-blocker pairing with minoxidil.
